label: About
heading: Where software meets
p1: I build systems that bridge the gap between raw environmental data and actionable insight — from satellite imagery ingestion pipelines to interactive biodiversity maps served at scale.
p2: With a solid foundation in fullstack engineering (Next.js, Python, PostgreSQL/PostGIS) and deep expertise in geospatial tooling (GDAL, QGIS, Deck.gl, Leaflet), I bring a data-first mindset to every product I work on.
p3: When I'm not writing code, I'm usually exploring open datasets on species distribution, land-cover change, or remote sensing archives.
